creator: eugen@freebsd.org
text:
Added VuXML entry is duplicate for earlier one a62c0c50-8aa0-11ee-ac0d-00e0670f2660 I added on 2023-11-24 in a rush.

In fact, our ports does not build affected part of strongswan (charon-tkm) at all, so the port was NOT affected by CVE-2023-41913, as I've discovered after that commit.
